purpose: Track human-reader format artifact review separately from generated-reader chapter-text review and separately from edition release records.

records.artifact_scope: Local ignored generated reader-site snapshot under build/reader_edition/format_artifacts/html/.
records.notes: Local HTML snapshots rendered, passed structural inspection, and received representative desktop/mobile browser checks across 28 page-view pairs. This is useful layout evidence but not a full release approval.
non_claims: This row is not a release record.
This row does not approve a published reader HTML artifact.
This row does not promote any claim support state.

records.notes: The EPUB snapshot rendered and passed zip/navigation/content structural checks. It has not been opened and inspected in an e-reader application.
non_claims: This row is not a release record.
This row does not approve an EPUB artifact for publication.
This row does not promote any claim support state.

records.notes: The DOCX snapshot rendered and passed container, document XML, media, title, and compact evidence-boundary structural checks. It has not been opened and inspected in Word, LibreOffice, or Google Docs.
non_claims: This row is not a release record.
This row does not approve a DOCX artifact for publication.
This row does not promote any claim support state.

records.artifact_scope: Local ignored UTF-8 PDF probe snapshot under build/reader_edition_pdf_probe_utf8/format_artifacts/pdf/_reader_site/The-ASI-Stack.pdf.
records.notes: The UTF-8 PDF probe rendered locally and representative pages 1, 21, 25, and 527 were visually sampled. The full 574-page PDF has not received a page-by-page layout review.
non_claims: This row is not a release record.
This row does not approve a PDF artifact for publication.
This row does not promote any claim support state.

release_rule: No reader HTML, EPUB, DOCX, PDF, e-reader conversion, audio, or audio-embedded EPUB artifact is release-approved until the relevant format row has no release blockers and an edition release record names the exact reviewed artifact.
non_claims: This matrix is a pre-release format-review ledger, not an edition release record.
This matrix does not publish or approve reader artifacts.
This matrix does not promote any claim support state.
This matrix does not supersede the live AI/research book for claims, source boundaries, proof/test status, implementation horizons, or release records.
